PLAINTIFF DANIEL RIVERA REQUIRES THE ASSISTANCE OF A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER IN ORDER TO PROCEED WITH TODAY'S HEARING. UNFORTUNATELY, ONE IS NOT AVAILABLE THIS MORNING. ADDITIONALLY, INTERVENOR DID NOT HAVE A WITNESS AVAILABLE TO TESTIFY IN SUPPORT OF ITS REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT. ERIC S. RITIGSTEIN, ESQ. APPEARED WITH PLAINTIFF DANIEL RIVERA, WHO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH, BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. MINGMEI ZHU, ESQ. APPEARED FOR INTERVENOR BERKELEYNET UNDERWRITERS. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Jun-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Set Hearing For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:28 a.m., adjourning at 10:49 a.m. and re-convening at 11:00 a.m.

Eric S. Ritigstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Daniel Rivera, whose appearance at today's hearing was waived at the last calling of the case on November 2, 2021.
Mr. Ritigstein appeared via ZOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury and Damages wass filed on October 30, 2018, and personally served on defendant Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc.'s Agent of process on November 1, 2018.
Plaintiff's Statement of Damages was served on defendant Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc. on May 3, 2019 and filed with the Clerk's Office on June 11, 2019.
Default as to defendant Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc. was entered on June 11, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 13, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Daniel Rivera, and against the defaulted defendant Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc., as follows:

General Damages - $300,000.00.
Special Damages - $292,000.00.
Costs - $794.00.

Total - $592,794.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 11:04 a.m.

Motion To Set Hearing For Default Prove-Up For Plaintiff In Intervention Berkleynet Underwriters Default Judgment Packet
Off Calendar Jan-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing on the BerkleyNet Underwriters' complaint-in-intervention as to defaulted defendant-in-intervention Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:28 a.m., adjourning at 10:49 a.m. and re-convening at 11:00 a.m.

Katherine A. Sandoval, Esq. appeared for plaintiff-in-intervention, BerkleyNet Underwriters.
Matt Gonder, Director of Claims for BerkeleyNet Underwriters, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Sandoval and Mr. Gonder appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing
No appearance by defendant-in-intervention Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc.

Plaintiff's complaint-in-intervention for Strict Liability, Negligene and Breach of Contract was filed on Jly 26, 2019, and personally served on defendant-in-intervention on September 29, 2019.
Default was entered on February 26, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 26, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff-in-Intervention BerkleyNet Underwriters, and against the defaulted defendant-in-interverntion Golden Gate Scaffolding, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $82,490.54.
Prejudgment Interest - $41,606.60.
Attorney Fees - 2,458.00.
Costs - $610.00.

Total - $127,165.14.

Counsel for plaintiff-in-intervention shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 11:04 a.m.
